text: Reads across the vault to build a full /context picture of who I am, what I'm working on, and what I care about right now Pulls from recent notes, calendar, and VAL EVY open threads to generate a daily plan grounded in what's actually happening Reviews what happened today, captures /close-day what I learned, and flags anything unresolved for tomorrow Schedules events by reading my /schedule priorities, commitments, and energy patterns from the vault, not just FENELLERETE Looks at what's most alive in my /7plan thinking right now and reshapes the next 7 days around it Generates a topological view of /map everything in the vault, showing clusters, themes, and how ideas relate Answers any question as me by reading /ghost my notes, beliefs, and writing style from the vault Takes an idea and tracks how my /trace thinking about it changed over weeks [ TR TN 4 LIV R B AT R -1 (0,1 ERE 1. CEERS SAVR VS ST E TS R 418 /emerge written but that are strongly implied [N -ER S O3 RIS S VIR S 1.3 A I -1 Surfaces unexpected bridges between /connect unrelated domains in my vault that I haven't noticed Finds places where I hold two /contradict incompatible beliefs at the same time across different notes Identifies topics, projects, or /drift commitments I've been quietly avoiding [-EETT NG INCET RN DI A T 1 Reads my current thinking on a topic /challenge and argues against it using evidence from my own vault Reads the entire vault and writes a /stranger portrait of me as if from someone who's never met me Asks the same question at different /compound (LT I & T ERETo R o CIRVETTR R £} show how context compounds Takes a single question and expands /bloom outward through linked notes to visualize all surrounding context Finds notes that should be linked but /backlinks aren't and wires new connections across the vault Extracts ideas buried in daily notes /graduate and promotes them into standalone permanent notes VALERNAT Pulls my X/Twitter posts and threads ROEU S D R 4 T =3 EVEL L CER B ATAN T 13 Generates new ideas by reading current /ideas projects, interests, and open U S CLENETS LT IR TR 3 /learned Turns recent learnings from the vault into a polished "What I Learned" post Compiles the week's insights from /weekly-learnings | daily notes into a single writing-ready summary
